capability_window.capability_slice: Convert skill and route evidence into bounded local lanes that can be validated before activation.

items.name: compass-skills
items.title: COMPASS-style skill ecosystem state handoff
items.summary: Skill ecosystem repository with skills directory metadata, route profiles, local memory and profile handoff pressure, documentation, validation notes, and no authority to install, enable, execute, or write profile state.

items.name: zhengxi-views
items.title: Skill-like Python agent repository
items.summary: Python agent skill workflow repository with SKILL.md-style signals, documentation, tests, validation scripts, config hints, and bounded local code patch possibilities.

items.name: Qwen-AgentWorld
items.title: General agent project requiring local harness evaluation
items.summary: General agent project with evaluation and benchmark signals but no skill workflow route hints or local skill package metadata.

items.name: looper
items.title: General agent loop project requiring local harness evaluation
items.summary: General agent loop project with agent topics but no skill workflow route hints, no bounded skill profile, and no local evaluation profile assigned.
